title: ContrastTarget Property
description: Sets the desired contrast for the edge search.
notes:
ContrastTarget is the desired difference in grayscale values between an edge and its background.  Use ContrastTarget to find weaker edges or edges at an angle.  First, find the edge you want to search for and record the Contrast result value. You may have to temporarily change the Edge object position to find it.  Next, set the ContrastTarget property to this value.  Then set the ScoreWeightContrast to a higher value then ScoreWeightStrength.  This tells the Edge object to look for an edge with the desired contrast and base the score on it.

See Also: ContrastTarget Property
